original text:
All International Martial Arts Form Events need to have Doctor on event.
All athletes & Member Organisation need accept the WADA Policy.
Form Event need to Have 3 judges from each style,They are certified by International Martial Arts Federation.
Time for Form competitor 2 mint.
Junior from 10-17 Years Old.
Senior From 18 Years Old.
All Form Athletes need to have International Martial Arts Member Passport for documentation of medical examinations.
Arena for Form Event is, 8 Meter X 8 Meter Standard soft puzzle mat for Martial Arts.
Martial Arts Self-Defense Time for Form competitor 2 mint. And Team Self-Defense Show max 4 person.
Absolutely Not hard contacts, and all technics must be controled.
For more safety of Junior Fighters,Ring Referee for Junior must have many years Experience!
Junior Class fights shall be scheduled for two (2) rounds with a one (1) minute rest period between rounds.
Each round will consist of two (2) minutes with a one (1) minute rest period between rounds.
With the split designs will be a one ( 1 ) round more.
Fighters with a record of up to four (4) fights with no more than 2 wins that have not fought professionally qualify for B Class.
Each round will consist of three (3) minutes with a one (1) minute rest period between rounds.
Fighters with a record of five (5) or more fights that have not fought professionally qualify.
Each round will consist of three (3) minutes duration with a one (1) minute rest period between rounds.
Men:Short trousers,T-shirt upper part of the body.
Women:Short trousers,T-shirt or ladies top.
If some fighter have not ,Fighter or National organisation or sport club can recive at the weigh-in on event.
Weigh-ins will vary depending on whether a fight is a professional or amateur event.
The official weigh-in for a professional fight will occur between 12 and 24 hours before the scheduled fight.
All INTERNATIONAL SPORT SANDA MARTIAL ARTS FEDERATIONS competitions must have a doctor.
All contestants are examined by a doctor at the weigh-in!
Medical examination:Controll:heart, blood pressure, pulse ,lungs, hearing, teeth, hernia, muscle, skin.
INTERNATIONAL SPORT SANDA FEDERATION.© All Judges and referee need to have 2 courses in year for better practice.
Signal's the respective point judges a red or black hand to announce the round winer.
A fighter who has sustained a KO or TKO in a fight must wait a minimum of sixty 60 days before engaging in another fight.
INTERNATIONAL SPORT SANDA MARTIAL ARTS FEDERATION.S-1© will report.
